query:
-- Check if prices were updated
SELECT trade_name, price FROM drug_lens WHERE trade_name IN (
  'ZIAGEN 300 mg Film-Coated Tablet',
  'KIVEXA 600/300 mg Film-Coated Tablet',
  'TYMLOS 2 mg/mL Solution for Injection (Pre-filled Pen)',
  'VERZENIO 150 mg Film-Coated Tablet'
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute 
-- Check if prices were updated
SELECT trade_name, price FROM drug_lens WHERE trade_name IN (
  'ZIAGEN 300 mg Film-Coated Tablet',
  'KIVEXA 600/300 mg Film-Coated Tablet',
  'TYMLOS 2 mg/mL Solution for Injection (Pre-filled Pen)',
  'VERZENIO 150 mg Film-Coated Tablet'
);

rows.trade_name: TYMLOS 2 mg/mL Solution for Injection (Pre-filled Pen)
